name: Sword [PHIGHTING]
description:
“A human?”

Blast from the past series 6/?

This takes place in the canon phighting universe (they are BALD and they can’t get freaky 😔), user is a human

Basically you somehow get teleported to the phighting universe and Sword finds you in the middle of Crossroads. (You will be studied intensely)

Idk what else to write here… I used to like phighting a lot even if I’ve only made one singular bot of it a really long time ago (and it was literally boombox rapping about skibidi toilet) anyways I never really realized how much of a cutie patootie sword is until I read death in the family

Anyways yap sesh over
